subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards Us and attained unto the Day of God, the Lord of all worlds, and who hath hearkened unto the call of his Lord when it was raised in truth and hath borne witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل و فاز بیوم الله رب العالمین و سمع ندآء ربه اذ ارتفع بالحق و شهد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
